title.en: 'You are Canadian heroes' - the forgotten hosts making World Cup history
title.zh-CN: “你们是加拿大的英雄” --被遗忘的东道主创造了世界杯的历史

summary.en: Canada are making history at this World Cup with a run that is likely to change the face of football in the country forever.
summary.zh-CN: 加拿大正在本届世界杯上创造历史，这场比赛可能会永远改变该国足球的面貌。

title.en: O Canada! The knockouts begin with a win for Marsch’s men: World Cup Daily – podcast
title.zh-CN: 哦，加拿大！淘汰赛始于Marsch's men的胜利：世界杯日报–播客

summary.en: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning, Mark Langdon and Jonathan Wilson as the knockout stages commence with a late, late winner for Canada over South AfricaRate, review, share on Apple Podcasts...
summary.zh-CN: 巴里·格伦登宁（ Barry Glendenning ）、马克·兰登（ Mark Langdon ）和乔纳森·威尔逊（ Jonathan Wilson ）加入了Max Rushden的淘汰赛阶段，加拿大队在淘汰赛中获得了晚期冠军，而南非队在淘汰赛中获得了晚

title.en: Canada into last 16 with late winner against South Africa
title.zh-CN: 加拿大进入最后16名，对阵南非的比赛获胜较晚

summary.en: Stephen Eustaquio scores a dramatic winner in the second minute of injury time as co-hosts Canada beat South Africa to move into the last 16 of the World Cup for the first time.
summary.zh-CN: 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔基奥（ Stephen Eustaquio ）在受伤时间的第二分钟取得了戏剧性的胜利，因为共同主持人加拿大首次击败南非进入世界杯的最后16场比赛。

title.en: How Bellingham became Tuchel's most important player
title.zh-CN: 贝灵厄姆如何成为图切尔最重要的球员

summary.en: His starting place was the subject of much debate in Thomas Tuchel's England team, but Jude Bellingham has become integral to the manager's style of play.
summary.zh-CN: 他的首发位置在托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的英格兰队中备受争议，但裘德·贝灵厄姆（ Jude Bellingham ）已成为这位经理人比赛风

title.en: Conspiracy or chaos? Algeria & Austria defend 'unexpected' draw
title.zh-CN: 阴谋还是混乱？阿尔及利亚和奥地利捍卫“意外”平局

summary.en: The 'Disgrace of Gijon' - an infamous match at the 1982 World Cup in Spain - has followed Austria and Algeria for 44 years. Did history repeat itself in Algeria's 3-3 draw with Austria on Sunday?
summary.zh-CN: 1982年西班牙世界杯上臭名昭著的“希洪之耻”比赛已经跟随奥地利和阿尔及利亚44年了。历史是否在阿尔及利亚周日与奥地利的3-3平局中重演？

title.en: Ugarte has 'most serious injury footballer can face'
title.zh-CN: 乌加特有“足球运动员可能面临的最严重的伤病”

summary.en: Manchester United have confirmed that midfielder Manuel Ugarte suffered knee ligament damage during Uruguay's World Cup defeat by Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 曼联证实，中场球员曼努埃尔·乌加特在乌拉圭世界杯期间被西班牙击败，膝盖韧带受损。

title.en: Eustaquio scores in injury-time to take Canada through to the last 16
title.zh-CN: Eustaquio受伤时间得分，将加拿大带到最后16分

summary.en: Stephen Eustaquio scores the only goal of the match against South Africa as Canada progresses to the last 16 of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 随着加拿大进入2026年世界杯的最后16场比赛， Stephen Eustaquio在对阵南非的比赛中打进了唯一的进球。

title.en: 27 flights, 24 matches: The carbon cost of Fifa president's World Cup tour
title.zh-CN: 27个航班， 24场比赛：国际足联主席世界杯之旅的碳排放成本

summary.en: Gianni Infantino has clocked up thousands of air miles across North America so far.
summary.zh-CN: 到目前为止， Gianni Infantino已经在北美各地飞行了数千英里。

title.en: Rice set for England start against DR Congo
title.zh-CN: 英格兰开始对阵刚果民主共和国的大米套餐

summary.en: Declan Rice is expected to be available to start England's World Cup last-32 tie with DR Congo on Wednesday.
summary.zh-CN: Declan Rice预计将于周三与刚果民主共和国开始英格兰世界杯的最后32场比赛。

title.en: What you need to know about England's opponents DR Congo
title.zh-CN: 您需要了解的英格兰对手刚果民主共和国的信息

summary.en: England will face DR Congo in the round of 32. Here is what you need to know about them.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰将在32轮比赛中面对刚果民主共和国。以下是您需要了解的有关他们的信息。

title.en: How to win a World Cup penalty shootout
title.zh-CN: 如何赢得世界杯点球大战

summary.en: We have a look at what can be learned from every World Cup penalty taken in a shootout ever.
summary.zh-CN: 我们来看看从有史以来枪战中的每一次世界杯点球中可以学到什么。

title.en: Job done - but England will not win World Cup unless they improve
title.zh-CN: 工作完成-但英格兰队除非进步，否则不会赢得世界杯

summary.en: England did their job topping the group - but they can forget winning the World Cup if they do not improve, writes Phil McNulty.
summary.zh-CN: 菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）写道，英格兰队在小组中名列前茅，但如果他们不进步，他们可能会忘记赢得世界杯。

title.en: Best team, moments, matches and players of World Cup group stage
title.zh-CN: 世界杯小组赛阶段的最佳球队、时刻、比赛和球员

summary.en: As the World Cup group stages come to an end, BBC Sport reporters pick their highlights so far.
summary.zh-CN: 随着世界杯小组赛阶段的结束， BBC体育记者挑选了迄今为止的亮点。

title.en: Kane becomes England's top World Cup scorer - and now chases other greats
title.zh-CN: 凯恩成为英格兰世界杯的顶级得分手-现在追逐其他伟人

summary.en: Harry Kane became England's all-time leading World Cup scorer with his 12th goal in the win against Panama on Saturday, but how does he compare to other country's greats?
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在周六对阵巴拿马的比赛中以第12个进球成为英格兰历史上领先的世界杯得分手，但他与其他国家的伟大球员相比如何？

title.en: Colombia denied late winner in enthralling draw with Portugal
title.zh-CN: 哥伦比亚否认在葡萄牙的迷人平局中迟到的赢家

summary.en: Colombia and Portugal play out one of the games of the tournament, as both sides qualify for the World Cup last 32 following a gripping 0-0 draw.
summary.zh-CN: 哥伦比亚和葡萄牙参加了本届锦标赛的一场比赛，双方在0-0平局之后都有资格参加世界杯的最后32场比赛。

title.en: DR Congo come from behind to book last-32 tie with England

summary.en: DR Congo set up a World Cup last-32 meeting with England by reaching the knockouts for the first time as they come from behind to beat Uzbekistan in their final group-stage game.

title.en: 'Get rid of VAR!' Rooney unhappy Sanchez goal ruled out

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundit Wayne Rooney cannot believe Davinson Sanchez's goal for Colombia against Portugal was ruled out because the defender was offside by a toe.

title.en: 'He's that guy!' Pundits praise 'brilliant' Bellingham

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Micah Richards and Wayne Rooney praise Jude Bellingham's "desire and hunger" to perform on the biggest stage, after the England midfielder produces a goal and an assist in...

title.en: Tuchel worried about right-back situation

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel says he is "worried" about England's right-back crisis after Jarell Quansah became the latest in the position to suffer injury.

title.en: Salah an injury doubt for Egypt's last-32 tie

summary.en: Egypt captain Mohamed Salah is a doubt for Friday's World Cup last-32 tie against Australia after suffering a hamstring injury.

title.en: Spain's Williams criticises tackle that injured him

summary.en: Nico Williams criticises Uruguay's Nicolas de la Cruz for a "completely unnecessary" tackle that injured the Spain winger.

title.en: Canada secure last-16 place after dramatic late winner vs South Africa

summary.en: Stephen Eustaquio scored a dramatic stoppage-time winner for co-hosts Canada as they beat South Africa 1-0 to become the first team to book their place in the last 16 of the World Cup.

title.en: Knockout time! World Cup bracket and all the ties after first team reaches last 16...

summary.en: The World Cup group stage is over and the knockout rounds are under way, with all roads leading to the final on July 19...

summary.en: England are through to the knockout rounds of the World Cup - and you can predict how the rest of the tournament will play out!

summary.en: What is England's potential path to World Cup glory?

title.en: England's chances of winning World Cup revealed by supercomputer...

title.en: Tuchel vows England will get better as Nev, Keane admit concerns

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel has vowed that "the bigger the game, the bigger England will be" after a laboured 2-0 victory over Panama sent them into knockout stages of the World Cup as Group L winners.

title.en: Canada first into last 16 as Stephen Eustáquio scores in stoppage time against South Africa

summary.en: As Canada’s players and staff huddled on the pitch to savour reaching the last 16 for the first time, the overhead Spidercam and the cameras belonging to the host broadcaster were the only outsiders...
